scope_title: 수강권 구매 직후 수업 예약을 유도하여 환불률을 낮춘다. 현재 전체 구매자의 8%가 수업을 한 번도 듣지 않고 환불하고 있다. 수업을 1회라도 수강한 사용자는 환불 가능성이 크게 낮아진다는 가설에 기반하여, 구매 완료 시점에 즉시 수업 예약을 강하게 권유하는 경험을 만든다.
goal: Maximize first-class booking rate at purchase completion. Reduce 0-class refund rate from 8% to 2-3% via completion screen with celebration, simplified booking, and one-time incentive.

user_journeys.persona: Ji-yeon, 28, marketing professional. Purchased a 10-class count-based ticket on a weekday evening. First-time PODO Speaking user with no booking history. Motivated to start quickly but uncertain which level to pick.
user_journeys.action: Journey 1 — Happy Path: Count-Based Plan User

user_journeys.persona: Min-jun, 35, returning user. Renewed his unlimited subscription after a 3-month break. Has booking history and a known level from previous sessions.
user_journeys.action: Journey 2 — Happy Path: Unlimited Plan User

user_journeys.persona: Soo-hyun, 31, busy professional. Purchased a class pack during lunch break on a mobile device. Does not have time to book right now and intends to do it later.
user_journeys.action: Journey 3 — Dismiss Path: User Declines Booking

applied_constraints.summary: 2-hour minimum advance booking requirement prevents immediate class start
applied_constraints.selected_option: Show earliest available slots, auto-select tomorrow if today empty
applied_constraints.impact_if_ignored: System will reject bookings less than 2 hours in advance. Users booking late at night may see no available slots.

applied_constraints.summary: Course must match ticket curriculumType (XG1 guard)
applied_constraints.selected_option: Filter levels by ticket curriculumType before display
applied_constraints.impact_if_ignored: Mismatched course-ticket combination rejected by LEC-1 precondition. User sees error.

applied_constraints.summary: Unlimited ticket allows only 1 concurrent booking
applied_constraints.selected_option: Check existing bookings, show alternative message if one exists
applied_constraints.impact_if_ignored: Returning unlimited users with existing booking cannot book again from completion screen.

applied_constraints.summary: No purchase completion screen exists — users go directly to Home
applied_constraints.selected_option: Build new purchase completion screen as confirmed in surface
applied_constraints.impact_if_ignored: No surface for booking CTA or incentive. Must build new screen.

applied_constraints.summary: BONUS acquisitionType from duplicate-ticket-purchase scope may not be in production
applied_constraints.selected_option: Check acquisitionType availability, fallback to TKT-3
applied_constraints.impact_if_ignored: Bonus ticket cannot be tagged as BONUS type. Fallback: TKT-3 admin API.

applied_constraints.summary: Each level must map to exactly one auto-assigned first lesson (LectureCourse)
applied_constraints.selected_option: Level-to-first-lesson mapping table using first active LectureCourse
applied_constraints.impact_if_ignored: System cannot auto-create a class without a specific LectureCourse. Must define mapping from level to first lesson.

applied_constraints.summary: One-time incentive requires server-side tracking to prevent double-claim on app restart
applied_constraints.selected_option: Server-side incentive eligibility flag on payment record
applied_constraints.impact_if_ignored: User could force-quit and reopen app to claim incentive multiple times. Must track claim status server-side.

decide_later_items: [CST-005] Taking 1 class forfeits 7-day cooling-off refund right — PO decided during Align: no refund disclosure needed, standard ToS applies.
out_of_scope: No-show / cancellation prevention after booking (separate scope)
External channel notifications — KakaoTalk, SMS, email (deferred)

brownfield_sources.name: Terms of Service Section 13
brownfield_sources.desc: CST-003: Unlimited: 1 lesson at a time

brownfield_sources.name: duplicate-ticket-purchase PRD
brownfield_sources.desc: CST-006: acquisitionType enum introduced in that scope

brownfield_sources.name: LEC-1 precondition
brownfield_sources.desc: CST-007: createNewPodoLecture requires a specific LectureCourse selection

brownfield_sources.name: preview
brownfield_sources.desc: CST-008: Incentive awarded on booking confirmation, disappears on exit
